name.zh: Active Directory 只读枚举命令（工具迁移）
name.en: Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: Active Directory 只读枚举命令

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: Active Directory 只读枚举命令 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 查询结果、公开 DNS 记录、目录对象或源站响应本身不是漏洞；只有它们与授权边界、资产归属、访问控制或预期配置不一致，并有服务器端或控制面证据支持时，才构成有效发现。
vulnerability.en: Query results, public DNS records, directory objects, or origin responses are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A finding requires a mismatch with authorization, ownership, access control, or expected configuration supported by server-side or control-plane evidence.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 按实际发现收紧目录查询与高权限组、隐藏源站并限制仅 CDN 网段访问、统一证书和 Host 路由配置，并为异常枚举、直连尝试和配置漂移建立审计。修复后使用同一只读命令回归。
mitigation.en: Tighten directory queries and privileged groups, restrict origins to CDN networks, align certificate and Host routing configuration, and audit anomalous enumeration, direct-origin attempts, and drift. Re-run the same read-only commands after remediation.

title.zh: 建立Active Directory 只读枚举命令前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 Active Directory 只读枚举命令 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条Active Directory 只读枚举命令基线命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 Active Directory 只读枚举命令 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联Active Directory 只读枚举命令权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands Evidence

description.zh: 把命令结果与目录、DNS、CDN 控制面、资产清单和审计日志对照，区分正常可见性、配置漂移和真实越权。
description.en: Compare command output with directory, DNS, CDN control-plane, asset-inventory, and audit-log evidence to distinguish normal visibility, drift, and actual authorization failures.

title.zh: 修复并回归Active Directory 只读枚举命令
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands

description.zh: 完成 Active Directory 只读枚举命令 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only Active Directory Enumeration Commands, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 有效结论必须同时包含查询身份、明确范围、原始输出和权威配置或日志。命令成功、域对象存在、公开 DNS 记录或 HTTP 200 都不能单独证明安全问题。
analysis.en: A valid conclusion requires query identity, explicit scope, raw output, and authoritative configuration or logs. Command success, a directory object, a public DNS record, or HTTP 200 alone does not prove a security issue.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目由 net、nltest 和 PowerView 枚举命令组成，属于工具命令手册；迁入 AD 域内枚举工具卡，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。

name.zh: SPN 与服务账号只读核对（工具迁移）
name.en: Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: SPN 与服务账号只读核对

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: SPN 与服务账号只读核对 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 目录、SPN、用户、组、GPO、信任和共享查询结果本身不是漏洞。只有查询身份获得了超出既定职责的对象、属性或共享可见性，并由目录 ACL、审计日志和批准基线共同证明时，才构成有效发现。
vulnerability.en: Directory, SPN, user, group, GPO, trust, and share query results are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires visibility beyond the querying identity's approved role, supported by directory ACLs, audit logs, and the approved baseline.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 按职责收紧目录读取、共享 ACL 和高权限组成员关系，清理过期 SPN、GPO 与信任配置，并记录高价值对象查询。修复后使用同一身份、SearchBase、对象和结果上限重复只读查询。
mitigation.en: Apply role-based directory visibility, share ACLs, and privileged-group membership; remove stale SPNs, GPOs, and trusts; and audit high-value object queries. Retest with the same identity, SearchBase, object, and result limit.

title.zh: 建立SPN 与服务账号只读核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 SPN 与服务账号只读核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条SPN 与服务账号只读核对基线命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 SPN 与服务账号只读核对 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联SPN 与服务账号只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review Evidence

description.zh: 把结果与目录 ACL、对象属性、共享权限、变更记录和域控制器审计日志对照，区分正常目录可见性、历史配置和真实越权。
description.en: Compare results with directory ACLs, object attributes, share permissions, change history, and domain-controller audit logs to distinguish normal visibility, legacy configuration, and actual authorization failures.

title.zh: 修复并回归SPN 与服务账号只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review

description.zh: 完成 SPN 与服务账号只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only SPN and Service-Account Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须标明查询身份、SearchBase 或单一目标、结果上限、工具版本和权威目录证据。命令成功、对象存在或 adminCount 标记不能单独证明权限风险。
analysis.en: A conclusion must identify the query identity, SearchBase or single target, result limit, tool version, and authoritative directory evidence. Command success, object existence, or an adminCount flag alone does not prove privilege risk.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目是 setspn、ActiveDirectory 模块和 Impacket 命令手册；迁入 AD 枚举与 Impacket 工具卡，并将全域查询、明文凭证和票据请求替换为单服务、SearchBase 限定或帮助检查。

prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.en: The original Bounded Single-Host Port Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 本机接口、路由、邻居缓存和授权主机端口状态是运维数据，不是漏洞。只有暴露面与资产清单、分段策略或监听基线不一致，并由防火墙、主机和网络日志共同证实时，才构成发现。
vulnerability.en: Local interfaces, routes, neighbor caches, and port state on an authorized host are operational data rather than vulnerabilities. A finding requires a mismatch with inventory, segmentation policy, or the listener baseline corroborated by firewall, host, and network logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 移除不需要的监听与路由，按资产角色收紧主机防火墙和分段策略，并对扫描速率、来源和失败连接建立审计。使用同一单主机、端口列表和速率上限执行回归。
mitigation.en: Remove unnecessary listeners and routes, enforce host firewall and segmentation by asset role, and audit scan rate, source, and failed connections. Retest with the same single host, port list, and rate limits.

title.zh: 建立有界单主机端口核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Bounded Single-Host Port Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 有界单主机端口核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Bounded Single-Host Port Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条有界单主机端口核对基线命令
title.en: Run One Bounded Single-Host Port Review Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 有界单主机端口核对 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only Bounded Single-Host Port Review command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联有界单主机端口核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Bounded Single-Host Port Review Evidence

description.zh: 把只读主机信息或有界探测结果与 CMDB、防火墙策略、监听进程和流量日志对照，避免把超时、过滤或服务横幅直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Compare read-only host information or bounded probes with CMDB records, firewall policy, listening processes, and traffic logs instead of treating timeouts, filtering, or service banners as vulnerabilities.

title.zh: 修复并回归有界单主机端口核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Bounded Single-Host Port Review

description.zh: 完成 有界单主机端口核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Bounded Single-Host Port Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 报告必须包含单一授权主机、显式端口集合、速率和重试上限、时间窗口及主机或网络侧证据；不得从一次开放端口或横幅推断可利用性。
analysis.en: Reports must include one authorized host, an explicit port set, rate and retry limits, a time window, and host- or network-side evidence; one open port or banner does not establish exploitability.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目包含 /24、全 65535 端口、Masscan 和 vuln NSE 的无界主动扫描；迁入 Nmap 与网络枚举工具卡，并限定为单一实验主机、显式端口、低速率和非侵入脚本。

name.zh: 本机网络状态只读核对（工具迁移）
name.en: Read-Only Local Network State Review (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: 本机网络状态只读核对

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: 本机网络状态只读核对 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Read-Only Local Network State Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 本机接口、路由、邻居缓存和授权主机端口状态是运维数据，不是漏洞。只有暴露面与资产清单、分段策略或监听基线不一致，并由防火墙、主机和网络日志共同证实时，才构成发现。
vulnerability.en: Local interfaces, routes, neighbor caches, and port state on an authorized host are operational data rather than vulnerabilities. A finding requires a mismatch with inventory, segmentation policy, or the listener baseline corroborated by firewall, host, and network logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 移除不需要的监听与路由，按资产角色收紧主机防火墙和分段策略，并对扫描速率、来源和失败连接建立审计。使用同一单主机、端口列表和速率上限执行回归。
mitigation.en: Remove unnecessary listeners and routes, enforce host firewall and segmentation by asset role, and audit scan rate, source, and failed connections. Retest with the same single host, port list, and rate limits.

title.en: Establish the Read-Only Local Network State Review Prerequisite Baseline

opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目是 Windows/Linux 本机网络诊断命令集合；迁入 internal-recon 工具卡，保留只读状态查询，并把 traceroute 限定为实验网关、五跳和短超时。

name.zh: SMB 共享可见性只读核对（工具迁移）
name.en: Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: SMB 共享可见性只读核对

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: SMB 共享可见性只读核对 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 目录、SPN、用户、组、GPO、信任和共享查询结果本身不是漏洞。只有查询身份获得了超出既定职责的对象、属性或共享可见性，并由目录 ACL、审计日志和批准基线共同证明时，才构成有效发现。
vulnerability.en: Directory, SPN, user, group, GPO, trust, and share query results are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires visibility beyond the querying identity's approved role, supported by directory ACLs, audit logs, and the approved baseline.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 按职责收紧目录读取、共享 ACL 和高权限组成员关系，清理过期 SPN、GPO 与信任配置，并记录高价值对象查询。修复后使用同一身份、SearchBase、对象和结果上限重复只读查询。
mitigation.en: Apply role-based directory visibility, share ACLs, and privileged-group membership; remove stale SPNs, GPOs, and trusts; and audit high-value object queries. Retest with the same identity, SearchBase, object, and result limit.

title.zh: 建立SMB 共享可见性只读核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 SMB 共享可见性只读核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条SMB 共享可见性只读核对基线命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 SMB 共享可见性只读核对 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联SMB 共享可见性只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review Evidence

description.zh: 把结果与目录 ACL、对象属性、共享权限、变更记录和域控制器审计日志对照，区分正常目录可见性、历史配置和真实越权。
description.en: Compare results with directory ACLs, object attributes, share permissions, change history, and domain-controller audit logs to distinguish normal visibility, legacy configuration, and actual authorization failures.

title.zh: 修复并回归SMB 共享可见性只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review

description.zh: 完成 SMB 共享可见性只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only SMB Share Visibility Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须标明查询身份、SearchBase 或单一目标、结果上限、工具版本和权威目录证据。命令成功、对象存在或 adminCount 标记不能单独证明权限风险。
analysis.en: A conclusion must identify the query identity, SearchBase or single target, result limit, tool version, and authoritative directory evidence. Command success, object existence, or an adminCount flag alone does not prove privilege risk.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目混合 net、SMBMap、CrackMapExec、smbclient 和 PowerView；迁入 SMB 与 PowerView 工具卡，移除明文凭证、旧 CME 名称和递归敏感文件搜索。

subCategory.en: Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: 域组与成员关系有界核对 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 目录、SPN、用户、组、GPO、信任和共享查询结果本身不是漏洞。只有查询身份获得了超出既定职责的对象、属性或共享可见性，并由目录 ACL、审计日志和批准基线共同证明时，才构成有效发现。
vulnerability.en: Directory, SPN, user, group, GPO, trust, and share query results are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires visibility beyond the querying identity's approved role, supported by directory ACLs, audit logs, and the approved baseline.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 按职责收紧目录读取、共享 ACL 和高权限组成员关系，清理过期 SPN、GPO 与信任配置，并记录高价值对象查询。修复后使用同一身份、SearchBase、对象和结果上限重复只读查询。
mitigation.en: Apply role-based directory visibility, share ACLs, and privileged-group membership; remove stale SPNs, GPOs, and trusts; and audit high-value object queries. Retest with the same identity, SearchBase, object, and result limit.

title.zh: 建立域组与成员关系有界核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 域组与成员关系有界核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条域组与成员关系有界核对基线命令
title.en: Run One Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 域组与成员关系有界核对 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联域组与成员关系有界核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review Evidence

description.zh: 把结果与目录 ACL、对象属性、共享权限、变更记录和域控制器审计日志对照，区分正常目录可见性、历史配置和真实越权。
description.en: Compare results with directory ACLs, object attributes, share permissions, change history, and domain-controller audit logs to distinguish normal visibility, legacy configuration, and actual authorization failures.

title.zh: 修复并回归域组与成员关系有界核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review

description.zh: 完成 域组与成员关系有界核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Bounded Domain Group and Membership Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须标明查询身份、SearchBase 或单一目标、结果上限、工具版本和权威目录证据。命令成功、对象存在或 adminCount 标记不能单独证明权限风险。
analysis.en: A conclusion must identify the query identity, SearchBase or single target, result limit, tool version, and authoritative directory evidence. Command success, object existence, or an adminCount flag alone does not prove privilege risk.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目由 net 与 PowerView 全域组枚举组成；迁入 AD 和 PowerView 工具卡，使用 SearchBase、单一实验组、结果上限和只读递归成员核对。

mitigation.en: Enforce least privilege by tenant, site, and mailbox role; disable legacy authentication; constrain Autodiscover, OAB, REST, and search fields; and retain administrative and read auditing. Replay the same metadata-only request after remediation.

description.en: Run only the first read-only Read-Only Exchange Configuration and Endpoint Review command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联Exchange 配置与端点只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only Exchange Configuration and Endpoint Review Evidence

description.zh: 把固定条数的元数据响应与租户配置、站点权限、Exchange RBAC 和统一审计日志对照，不下载邮件正文、文档内容或离线通讯录。
description.en: Compare a fixed-size metadata response with tenant configuration, site permissions, Exchange RBAC, and unified audit logs without downloading mail bodies, document content, or offline address books.

title.zh: 修复并回归Exchange 配置与端点只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only Exchange Configuration and Endpoint Review

description.zh: 完成 Exchange 配置与端点只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only Exchange Configuration and Endpoint Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 证据必须包含测试身份、租户或站点、请求字段、结果上限和服务端授权日志；HTTP 200、产品版本或对象名称不能单独证明越权。
analysis.en: Evidence must identify the test identity, tenant or site, requested fields, result limit, and server authorization logs. HTTP 200, a product version, or an object name alone does not prove unauthorized access.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目混合 OWA、Autodiscover、OAB 下载和 NTLM 信息命令；迁入 Exchange/M365 工具卡，移除证书忽略、明文基本认证、邮箱枚举和通讯录下载，只保留端点头与管理元数据。

name.zh: SharePoint 站点元数据有界核对（工具迁移）
name.en: Bounded SharePoint Site Metadata Review (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: SharePoint 站点元数据有界核对

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: SharePoint 站点元数据有界核对 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original Bounded SharePoint Site Metadata Review card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: Exchange 或 SharePoint 端点、站点、列表和版本元数据的可见性本身不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明当前测试身份读取了超出已批准租户、站点或角色边界的数据，并能与服务端授权决策和审计日志关联。
vulnerability.en: Visibility of Exchange or SharePoint endpoints, sites, lists, and version metadata is not a vulnerability by itself. A valid finding requires proof that the test identity read data beyond its approved tenant, site, or role boundary, correlated with server authorization decisions and audit logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 按租户、站点和邮箱角色实施最小权限，禁用遗留认证，限制 Autodiscover、OAB、REST 和搜索返回字段，并保留管理与读取审计。修复后重放同一只读元数据请求。
mitigation.en: Enforce least privilege by tenant, site, and mailbox role; disable legacy authentication; constrain Autodiscover, OAB, REST, and search fields; and retain administrative and read auditing. Replay the same metadata-only request after remediation.

name.zh: DNS 隧道参数与文档预检（工具迁移）
name.en: DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight (Tool Migration)

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This entry contains multiple product or system commands and is migrated to the corresponding tool card for commands, parameters, prerequisites, and evidence rather than remaining a standalone payload.

subCategory.zh: DNS 隧道参数与文档预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: DNS 隧道参数与文档预检 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 隧道、代理或客户端帮助输出不是漏洞。风险来自监听绑定超出回环、缺少认证、允许未批准目标、持久化启动或绕过分段策略，必须由进程参数、监听套接字、路由和流量日志证明。
vulnerability.en: Tunnel, proxy, or client help output is not a vulnerability. Risk comes from listeners beyond loopback, missing authentication, unapproved destinations, persistent startup, or segmentation bypass and must be proven through process arguments, sockets, routes, and traffic logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 默认绑定回环，限制单一 marker 服务和短时会话，启用身份校验、失败退出和集中日志，禁止全网段路由与持久化服务。回归时先检查参数和监听范围，再发送一个本地 marker 请求。
mitigation.en: Bind to loopback by default, limit testing to one marker service and a short-lived session, require identity checks and failure-on-forward, centralize logs, and prohibit broad routes or persistent services. Retest arguments and listener scope before one local marker request.

title.zh: 建立DNS 隧道参数与文档预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 DNS 隧道参数与文档预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。

title.en: Run One DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 DNS 隧道参数与文档预检 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。

title.zh: 关联DNS 隧道参数与文档预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 核对帮助或预检输出、进程参数、回环监听、单一 marker 流量和清理结果；不得启动远程 Agent、全流量路由或对未声明网段执行探测。
description.en: Correlate help or preflight output, process arguments, loopback listeners, one marker flow, and cleanup results without starting remote agents, full-traffic routing, or probes against undeclared networks.

title.zh: 修复并回归DNS 隧道参数与文档预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight

description.zh: 完成 DNS 隧道参数与文档预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for DNS Tunnel Argument and Documentation Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 有效结论需要监听地址、端口、目标服务、会话时长、认证方式和清理证据。工具存在、帮助可用或 SOCKS 端口可创建都不代表分段被绕过。
analysis.en: A valid conclusion requires listener address, port, destination service, session duration, authentication method, and cleanup evidence. Tool availability, help output, or the ability to create a SOCKS port does not establish segmentation bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目直接启动 dnscat2 服务端、客户端和转发监听；迁入 network-pivoting 工具卡，仅保留帮助与离线文档预检，不启动 DNS 隧道或监听器。

prerequisites.zh: 默认执行只读查询；任何写入、认证尝试、全端口扫描或配置变更必须另行批准。
prerequisites.en: Use read-only queries by default; writes, authentication attempts, full-port scans, and configuration changes require separate approval.

overview.zh: ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检 原卡片本质上是命令手册而不是可独立验证的输入载荷。迁移后，工具区统一维护安装、占位符、范围、预期输出和停止条件，Payload 区只保留可复现的技术边界。
overview.en: The original ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight card is a command manual rather than an independently testable input payload. After migration, installation, placeholders, scope, expected output, and stop conditions are maintained in the tool section while the payload section retains reproducible technical boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 隧道、代理或客户端帮助输出不是漏洞。风险来自监听绑定超出回环、缺少认证、允许未批准目标、持久化启动或绕过分段策略，必须由进程参数、监听套接字、路由和流量日志证明。
vulnerability.en: Tunnel, proxy, or client help output is not a vulnerability. Risk comes from listeners beyond loopback, missing authentication, unapproved destinations, persistent startup, or segmentation bypass and must be proven through process arguments, sockets, routes, and traffic logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份与范围，再一次运行一条只读命令并保存原始输出；把结果与资产清单、目录配置、DNS、HTTP 头或审计日志交叉核对。出现非授权资产、敏感正文、状态变更或过量请求时立即停止。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity and scope, run one read-only command at a time, preserve raw output, and compare it with inventories, directory configuration, DNS, HTTP headers, or audit logs. Stop on unauthorized assets, sensitive bodies, state changes, or excessive requests.

mitigation.zh: 默认绑定回环，限制单一 marker 服务和短时会话，启用身份校验、失败退出和集中日志，禁止全网段路由与持久化服务。回归时先检查参数和监听范围，再发送一个本地 marker 请求。
mitigation.en: Bind to loopback by default, limit testing to one marker service and a short-lived session, require identity checks and failure-on-forward, centralize logs, and prohibit broad routes or persistent services. Retest arguments and listener scope before one local marker request.

title.zh: 建立ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检基线命令
title.en: Run One ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight Baseline Command

description.zh: 只运行 ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检 的第一条只读命令并保存原始输出、时间戳和查询上下文，不并发扩展到其他资产。
description.en: Run only the first read-only ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight command and preserve raw output, timestamps, and query context without expanding concurrently to other assets.

title.zh: 关联ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 核对帮助或预检输出、进程参数、回环监听、单一 marker 流量和清理结果；不得启动远程 Agent、全流量路由或对未声明网段执行探测。
description.en: Correlate help or preflight output, process arguments, loopback listeners, one marker flow, and cleanup results without starting remote agents, full-traffic routing, or probes against undeclared networks.

title.zh: 修复并回归ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight

description.zh: 完成 ICMP 隧道能力与接口预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for ICMP Tunnel Capability and Interface Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 有效结论需要监听地址、端口、目标服务、会话时长、认证方式和清理证据。工具存在、帮助可用或 SOCKS 端口可创建都不代表分段被绕过。
analysis.en: A valid conclusion requires listener address, port, destination service, session duration, authentication method, and cleanup evidence. Tool availability, help output, or the ability to create a SOCKS port does not establish segmentation bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 原条目直接启动 ICMP 隧道服务端和外部客户端；迁入 network-pivoting 工具卡，只查看帮助、文件能力和现有 TUN/TAP 接口，不发送 ICMP 隧道流量。

description.zh: 该条目由多条产品或系统命令组成，已迁入对应工具卡维护命令、参数、前置条件和证据，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。

review.rationale: 原条目直接启动 SSH、Cobalt Strike 和 Metasploit SOCKS，并修改全局 ProxyChains 配置后扫描目标；迁入四个对应工具卡，改为配置展开、一次性回环 marker 配置和帮助检查。

name.zh: SSH 横向管理安全预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: SSH 横向管理安全预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: SSH 横向管理安全预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 远程管理工具、WinRM/SSH 可达性和帮助输出本身不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明未经批准的身份或网络边界可以执行远程操作，并由服务端授权、主机日志和网络策略共同证实。
vulnerability.en: Remote-management tools, WinRM or SSH reachability, and help output are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires proof that an unapproved identity or network boundary can perform remote operations, corroborated by server authorization, host logs, and network policy.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按主机角色限制 SSH、WinRM 和 WinRS 来源，强制密钥或短期凭证、最小权限与分段策略，关闭不需要的远程服务并审计会话。修复后以同一身份和单一实验主机重复预检。
mitigation.en: Restrict SSH, WinRM, and WinRS sources by host role; enforce keys or short-lived credentials, least privilege, and segmentation; disable unneeded services and audit sessions. Repeat the preflight with the same identity and one lab host after remediation.

title.zh: 建立SSH 横向管理安全预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 SSH 横向管理安全预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条SSH 横向管理安全预检验证命令
title.en: Run One Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 SSH 横向管理安全预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联SSH 横向管理安全预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 把配置展开、单主机响应、身份、端口、认证方式与 Windows/OpenSSH 审计日志对照，不把连接成功或客户端存在直接视为越权。
description.en: Correlate configuration expansion, one-host responses, identity, port, authentication method, and Windows or OpenSSH audit logs without treating client availability or connection success as unauthorized access.

title.zh: 修复并回归SSH 横向管理安全预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight

description.zh: 完成 SSH 横向管理安全预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe SSH Lateral-Management Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须记录单一目标、身份、认证方式、监听地址、命令输出和服务端审计事件；帮助文本或端口开放不能单独证明横向移动风险。
analysis.en: Conclusions must record one target, identity, authentication method, listener address, command output, and server audit events; help text or an open port alone does not prove lateral-movement risk.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: SSH 横向管理安全预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe WinRM Remote-Management Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 把配置展开、单主机响应、身份、端口、认证方式与 Windows/OpenSSH 审计日志对照，不把连接成功或客户端存在直接视为越权。
description.en: Correlate configuration expansion, one-host responses, identity, port, authentication method, and Windows or OpenSSH audit logs without treating client availability or connection success as unauthorized access.

title.zh: 修复并回归WinRM 远程管理安全预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe WinRM Remote-Management Preflight

description.zh: 完成 WinRM 远程管理安全预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe WinRM Remote-Management Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须记录单一目标、身份、认证方式、监听地址、命令输出和服务端审计事件；帮助文本或端口开放不能单独证明横向移动风险。
analysis.en: Conclusions must record one target, identity, authentication method, listener address, command output, and server audit events; help text or an open port alone does not prove lateral-movement risk.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: WinRM 远程管理安全预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: WinRS 横向管理能力预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: WinRS 横向管理能力预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: WinRS 横向管理能力预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: WinRS Lateral-Management Capability Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 远程管理工具、WinRM/SSH 可达性和帮助输出本身不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明未经批准的身份或网络边界可以执行远程操作，并由服务端授权、主机日志和网络策略共同证实。
vulnerability.en: Remote-management tools, WinRM or SSH reachability, and help output are not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires proof that an unapproved identity or network boundary can perform remote operations, corroborated by server authorization, host logs, and network policy.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按主机角色限制 SSH、WinRM 和 WinRS 来源，强制密钥或短期凭证、最小权限与分段策略，关闭不需要的远程服务并审计会话。修复后以同一身份和单一实验主机重复预检。
mitigation.en: Restrict SSH, WinRM, and WinRS sources by host role; enforce keys or short-lived credentials, least privilege, and segmentation; disable unneeded services and audit sessions. Repeat the preflight with the same identity and one lab host after remediation.

description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for WinRS Lateral-Management Capability Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条WinRS 横向管理能力预检验证命令

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 WinRS 横向管理能力预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed WinRS Lateral-Management Capability Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

name.zh: Windows 提权边界只读核对

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: Windows 提权边界只读核对 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: Windows 令牌权限、服务清单或未引用路径只是枚举结果。只有低权限主体能够修改由高权限服务加载的二进制、目录、注册表参数或服务配置，并且重启或触发条件可达时，才形成可利用的提权边界。
vulnerability.en: Windows token privileges, service inventory, and unquoted paths are enumeration results only. An exploitable boundary requires a low-privilege principal to modify a binary, directory, registry argument, or service configuration loaded by a privileged service, with a reachable restart or trigger condition.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 收紧服务对象、二进制目录和注册表 ACL，引用包含空格的服务路径，移除不必要的令牌权限并使用受管服务账号。修复后以同一低权限主体重复 ACL 与服务基线查询。
mitigation.en: Tighten service-object, binary-directory, and registry ACLs; quote service paths containing spaces; remove unnecessary token privileges; and use managed service identities. Repeat the ACL and service baseline with the same low-privilege principal after remediation.

title.zh: 建立Windows 提权边界只读核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 Windows 提权边界只读核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条Windows 提权边界只读核对验证命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 Windows 提权边界只读核对 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联Windows 提权边界只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review Evidence

description.zh: 关联 whoami 令牌、服务 StartName/PathName、服务对象 ACL、文件与父目录 ACL、启动方式以及 4688、4697、7045 或 EDR 事件；仅有 Everyone 字样或未引用路径不能证明可提权。
description.en: Correlate the whoami token, service StartName and PathName, service-object ACLs, file and parent-directory ACLs, start method, and 4688, 4697, 7045, or EDR events. An Everyone entry or unquoted path alone does not prove privilege escalation.

title.zh: 修复并回归Windows 提权边界只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review

description.zh: 完成 Windows 提权边界只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only Windows Privilege-Boundary Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须指出低权限主体、可写对象、高权限加载方、触发条件和可回滚证据；缺少任一环节时只能记为待核配置。
analysis.en: A conclusion must identify the low-privilege principal, writable object, privileged loader, trigger condition, and reversible evidence; without every link, classify it as configuration requiring review.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: Windows 提权边界只读核对 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: Linux 提权边界只读核对

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: Linux 提权边界只读核对

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: Linux 提权边界只读核对 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Read-Only Linux Privilege-Boundary Review remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: SUID、sudo、Linux capabilities、Cron 或 systemd 条目本身不是漏洞。只有当前低权限主体可控制高权限程序的可执行文件、参数、环境变量、搜索路径或被加载资源，并能稳定到达高权限执行点时，才构成提权链。
vulnerability.en: SUID files, sudo rules, Linux capabilities, Cron entries, and systemd units are not vulnerabilities by themselves. Privilege escalation requires the current low-privilege principal to control a privileged program, argument, environment variable, search path, or loaded resource and reliably reach the privileged execution point.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 移除非必要 SUID/SGID 与 file capabilities，使用精确 sudo 命令和参数约束，修复 Cron/systemd 文件及父目录所有权，并清理可写 PATH 与动态库搜索路径。修复后以同一 UID/GID 重放只读枚举。
mitigation.en: Remove unnecessary SUID or SGID bits and file capabilities, constrain sudo commands and arguments precisely, correct Cron or systemd file and parent-directory ownership, and remove writable PATH or library-search entries. Replay read-only enumeration with the same UID and GID after remediation.

title.zh: 建立Linux 提权边界只读核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only Linux Privilege-Boundary Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 Linux 提权边界只读核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。

title.zh: 关联Linux 提权边界只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only Linux Privilege-Boundary Review Evidence

description.zh: 关联 UID/GID、mount 选项、sudoers 展开结果、文件及父目录 mode/owner/capabilities、任务运行身份和 auditd/journal 事件；仅匹配 GTFOBins 条目不能证明目标配置可利用。
description.en: Correlate UID and GID, mount options, expanded sudoers rules, file and parent-directory mode, owner and capabilities, task identity, and auditd or journal events. A GTFOBins match alone does not prove that the target configuration is exploitable.

title.zh: 修复并回归Linux 提权边界只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only Linux Privilege-Boundary Review

description.zh: 完成 Linux 提权边界只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only Linux Privilege-Boundary Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须给出主体、具体文件或规则、可控输入、高权限消费者和触发方式；只列出 SUID 文件、sudo -l 或内核版本属于发现线索而非提权证据。
analysis.en: A conclusion must identify the principal, exact file or rule, controllable input, privileged consumer, and trigger. A SUID list, sudo -l output, or kernel version is a lead rather than privilege-escalation proof.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: Linux 内核风险只读核对 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 内核版本字符串或漏洞扫描器命中不能直接证明可利用。发行版可能回移补丁，实际适用性取决于内核包构建、架构、配置项、命名空间与 LSM、容器边界以及攻击者当前权限。
vulnerability.en: A kernel version string or scanner match does not prove exploitability. Distributions may backport fixes, and applicability depends on the exact kernel package build, architecture, configuration, namespaces and LSMs, container boundary, and the attacker's current privileges.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按发行版公告和已安装包版本确认修复状态，升级受支持内核并完成必要重启，禁用不需要的用户命名空间或高风险模块，并监控异常崩溃和提权行为。修复后重新采集同一版本与包基线。
mitigation.en: Use distribution advisories and installed package versions to confirm fix status, upgrade to a supported kernel and reboot when required, disable unnecessary user namespaces or risky modules, and monitor anomalous crashes and elevation. Recollect the same version and package baseline after remediation.

title.zh: 建立Linux 内核风险只读核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 Linux 内核风险只读核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条Linux 内核风险只读核对验证命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 Linux 内核风险只读核对 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联Linux 内核风险只读核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review Evidence

description.zh: 关联 uname、发行版与内核包版本、供应商公告、启动中的实际内核、关键配置和补丁状态；不得用 Searchsploit 结果或上游版本范围替代发行版适用性判断。
description.en: Correlate uname output, distribution and kernel package versions, vendor advisories, the actually booted kernel, relevant configuration, and patch state. Do not substitute Searchsploit results or upstream version ranges for distribution-specific applicability.

title.zh: 修复并回归Linux 内核风险只读核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review

description.zh: 完成 Linux 内核风险只读核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only Linux Kernel Risk Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 报告必须标明发行版、精确包构建、架构、启动内核、适用公告与前置权限；缺少供应商适用性证据时只能记录待核 CVE。
analysis.en: Reports must identify the distribution, exact package build, architecture, booted kernel, applicable advisory, and prerequisite privileges. Without vendor applicability evidence, record only a CVE requiring review.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: Linux 内核风险只读核对 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: Potato 工具能力安全预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: Potato 系列依赖具体的 Token 模拟权限、服务身份、Windows 版本、COM/RPC 或命名管道行为以及补丁状态。存在 SeImpersonatePrivilege 或某个工具二进制并不等于任意版本都可提权。
vulnerability.en: Potato-family techniques depend on specific token-impersonation privileges, service identities, Windows versions, COM or RPC or named-pipe behavior, and patch state. SeImpersonatePrivilege or a tool binary does not mean every variant can elevate on every version.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 移除不需要的 SeImpersonatePrivilege 与 SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege，避免高权限服务向低信任主体暴露可模拟的本地接口，应用系统与 .NET 补丁，并监控异常命名管道、COM/RPC、令牌复制和 SYSTEM 子进程。
mitigation.en: Remove unnecessary SeImpersonatePrivilege and SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege, prevent privileged services from exposing impersonable local interfaces to low-trust principals, apply OS and .NET patches, and monitor anomalous named pipes, COM or RPC, token duplication, and SYSTEM child processes.

title.zh: 建立Potato 工具能力安全预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条Potato 工具能力安全预检验证命令
title.en: Run One Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 Potato 工具能力安全预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联Potato 工具能力安全预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 关联当前服务账号、有效令牌权限、OS build、工具支持矩阵、命名管道或 COM/RPC 事件、4688/Sysmon 进程树与最终 Token；账户创建、下载和回连动作必须与最小权限证明分开记录。
description.en: Correlate the service identity, effective token privileges, OS build, tool support matrix, named-pipe or COM or RPC events, 4688 or Sysmon process trees, and resulting token. Record account creation, downloads, and callbacks separately from minimal privilege proof.

title.zh: 修复并回归Potato 工具能力安全预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight

description.zh: 完成 Potato 工具能力安全预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe Potato-Tool Capability Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 有效链路必须证明前置权限、适用技术变体、高权限 Token 或进程结果及清理状态；工具帮助、权限名称或失败进程不能单独确认提权。
analysis.en: A valid chain must prove the prerequisite privilege, applicable technique variant, privileged token or process result, and cleanup state. Tool help, a privilege name, or a failed process does not confirm elevation.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: Potato 工具能力安全预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: 进程注入能力安全预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: 进程注入能力安全预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 签名二进制、AppLocker 规则和进程注入 API 的存在或签名状态不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明策略允许未授权代码执行、跨边界进程写入或绕过审计，并由策略、令牌、进程树和日志证实。
vulnerability.en: The presence or signature state of signed binaries, AppLocker rules, and process-injection APIs is not a vulnerability by itself. A valid finding requires proof that policy permits unauthorized code execution, cross-boundary process writes, or audit bypass, corroborated by policy, tokens, process trees, and logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按路径和发布者收紧 AppLocker/WDAC 规则，阻止用户可写目录中的代理执行，启用进程访问审计与 EDR 规则并限制调试权限。修复后只做签名和策略预检。
mitigation.en: Tighten AppLocker or WDAC rules by path and publisher, block proxy execution from user-writable directories, enable process-access auditing and EDR rules, and restrict debug privileges. Re-run signature and policy preflights after remediation.

title.zh: 建立进程注入能力安全预检前置条件基线

description.zh: 记录 进程注入能力安全预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。

title.zh: 运行一条进程注入能力安全预检验证命令
title.en: Run One Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 进程注入能力安全预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联进程注入能力安全预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 保存签名状态、策略命中、进程路径、父子关系、令牌和审计事件，区分合法系统组件调用与未授权代码执行。
description.en: Preserve signature status, policy decisions, process paths, parent-child relationships, tokens, and audit events to distinguish legitimate system-component use from unauthorized code execution.

title.zh: 修复并回归进程注入能力安全预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight

description.zh: 完成 进程注入能力安全预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe Process-Injection Capability Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须说明发布者、路径、策略规则、主体令牌和执行/写入证据；二进制存在或帮助输出不能单独证明绕过。
analysis.en: Conclusions must state publisher, path, policy rule, principal token, and execution or write evidence; binary presence or help output alone does not prove a bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 进程注入能力安全预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

description.zh: 保存签名状态、策略命中、进程路径、父子关系、令牌和审计事件，区分合法系统组件调用与未授权代码执行。
description.en: Preserve signature status, policy decisions, process paths, parent-child relationships, tokens, and audit events to distinguish legitimate system-component use from unauthorized code execution.

title.zh: 修复并回归AppLocker 与 LOLBin 策略预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest AppLocker and LOLBin Policy Preflight

description.zh: 完成 AppLocker 与 LOLBin 策略预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for AppLocker and LOLBin Policy Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须说明发布者、路径、策略规则、主体令牌和执行/写入证据；二进制存在或帮助输出不能单独证明绕过。
analysis.en: Conclusions must state publisher, path, policy rule, principal token, and execution or write evidence; binary presence or help output alone does not prove a bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: AppLocker 与 LOLBin 策略预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: 签名二进制策略安全预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: 签名二进制策略安全预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: 签名二进制策略安全预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Safe Signed-Binary Policy Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 签名二进制、AppLocker 规则和进程注入 API 的存在或签名状态不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明策略允许未授权代码执行、跨边界进程写入或绕过审计，并由策略、令牌、进程树和日志证实。
vulnerability.en: The presence or signature state of signed binaries, AppLocker rules, and process-injection APIs is not a vulnerability by itself. A valid finding requires proof that policy permits unauthorized code execution, cross-boundary process writes, or audit bypass, corroborated by policy, tokens, process trees, and logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按路径和发布者收紧 AppLocker/WDAC 规则，阻止用户可写目录中的代理执行，启用进程访问审计与 EDR 规则并限制调试权限。修复后只做签名和策略预检。
mitigation.en: Tighten AppLocker or WDAC rules by path and publisher, block proxy execution from user-writable directories, enable process-access auditing and EDR rules, and restrict debug privileges. Re-run signature and policy preflights after remediation.

title.zh: 建立签名二进制策略安全预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Safe Signed-Binary Policy Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 签名二进制策略安全预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Safe Signed-Binary Policy Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条签名二进制策略安全预检验证命令
title.en: Run One Safe Signed-Binary Policy Preflight Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 签名二进制策略安全预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Safe Signed-Binary Policy Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

analysis.en: Conclusions must state publisher, path, policy rule, principal token, and execution or write evidence; binary presence or help output alone does not prove a bypass.

opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 签名二进制策略安全预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.
