overview.zh: 计划任务持久化安全核对 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Safe Scheduled-Task Persistence Review remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 计划任务、Cron 条目和管理 cmdlet 是持久化管理面，不是漏洞本身。有效发现需要证明低权限主体可创建或修改高权限触发器，且该路径绕过审批或审计。
vulnerability.en: Scheduled tasks, Cron entries, and management cmdlets are persistence administration surfaces, not vulnerabilities by themselves. A valid finding requires proof that a low-privilege principal can create or modify a privileged trigger outside approved change and audit controls.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 限制任务和 Cron 文件的写权限，按服务身份执行最小权限，启用创建/修改审计并清理遗留条目。修复后仅读取同一任务路径和审计事件，确认正常运维仍可用。
mitigation.en: Restrict write access to task and Cron definitions, run service identities with least privilege, audit creation and modification, and remove stale entries. Re-read the same task path and audit events after remediation while preserving legitimate operations.

title.zh: 关联计划任务持久化安全核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe Scheduled-Task Persistence Review Evidence

description.zh: 关联任务路径、触发器、运行身份、动作路径、文件 ACL、变更审批和系统日志，不执行动作或注册新任务。
description.en: Correlate task path, trigger, run identity, action path, file ACL, change approval, and system logs without executing an action or registering a new task.

title.zh: 修复并回归计划任务持久化安全核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe Scheduled-Task Persistence Review

description.zh: 完成 计划任务持久化安全核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe Scheduled-Task Persistence Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 报告应记录任务/条目、主体、触发时间、动作文件、权限差异和清理证据；命令帮助或现有任务名称不能单独证明持久化漏洞。
analysis.en: Reports should record the task or entry, principal, trigger time, action file, permission delta, and cleanup evidence; command help or an existing task name alone does not prove a persistence vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 计划任务持久化安全核对 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。

overview.en: Exchange Mailbox-Access Boundary Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: Exchange 或 SharePoint 端点、站点、列表和版本元数据的可见性本身不是漏洞。有效发现需要证明当前测试身份读取了超出已批准租户、站点或角色边界的数据，并能与服务端授权决策和审计日志关联。
vulnerability.en: Visibility of Exchange or SharePoint endpoints, sites, lists, and version metadata is not a vulnerability by itself. A valid finding requires proof that the test identity read data beyond its approved tenant, site, or role boundary, correlated with server authorization decisions and audit logs.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 按租户、站点和邮箱角色实施最小权限，禁用遗留认证，限制 Autodiscover、OAB、REST 和搜索返回字段，并保留管理与读取审计。修复后重放同一只读元数据请求。
mitigation.en: Enforce least privilege by tenant, site, and mailbox role; disable legacy authentication; constrain Autodiscover, OAB, REST, and search fields; and retain administrative and read auditing. Replay the same metadata-only request after remediation.

description.en: Compare a fixed-size metadata response with tenant configuration, site permissions, Exchange RBAC, and unified audit logs without downloading mail bodies, document content, or offline address books.

description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Exchange Mailbox-Access Boundary Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.en: Evidence must identify the test identity, tenant or site, requested fields, result limit, and server authorization logs. HTTP 200, a product version, or an object name alone does not prove unauthorized access.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

overview.en: Safe Unattended-Credential File Review remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 无人值守 XML、Sysprep、GPP、部署脚本或连接字符串只有在低权限主体可读且仍包含可用秘密时才形成凭据暴露。文件名、字段名、Base64 或 cpassword 标记本身不能证明存在有效凭据。
vulnerability.en: Unattended XML, Sysprep, Group Policy Preferences, deployment scripts, or connection strings expose credentials only when a low-privilege principal can read a still-usable secret. A filename, field name, Base64 value, or cpassword marker alone does not prove valid credential exposure.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 从镜像、部署共享和历史 GPO 中移除秘密，轮换已暴露账号，使用 LAPS、gMSA 或密钥保管服务，限制 Panther 与部署目录 ACL，并对敏感字段和异常读取建立审计。
mitigation.en: Remove secrets from images, deployment shares, and historical GPOs; rotate exposed identities; use LAPS, gMSA, or a secret vault; restrict Panther and deployment-directory ACLs; and audit sensitive fields and anomalous reads.

title.zh: 建立无人值守凭证文件安全核对前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Safe Unattended-Credential File Review; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条无人值守凭证文件安全核对验证命令
title.en: Run One Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Safe Unattended-Credential File Review command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联无人值守凭证文件安全核对权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Safe Unattended-Credential File Review Evidence

description.zh: 记录文件路径、所有者、ACL、部署来源、字段类型和秘密生命周期；正文只保留脱敏哈希或专用测试值，并用身份系统日志确认是否仍有效，禁止在报告中保存真实密码。
description.en: Record the file path, owner, ACL, deployment source, field type, and secret lifecycle. Retain only a redacted hash or dedicated test value, and use identity logs to confirm validity without storing a real password in the report.

title.zh: 修复并回归无人值守凭证文件安全核对
title.en: Remediate and Retest Safe Unattended-Credential File Review

description.zh: 完成 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Safe Unattended-Credential File Review, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须同时证明未授权可读、秘密材料存在且仍具业务效力，并记录轮换与清理；仅发现配置文件或编码字段属于资产卫生问题。
analysis.en: A conclusion must prove unauthorized readability, the presence of secret material, and current business validity, with rotation and cleanup recorded. Finding a configuration file or encoded field alone is an asset-hygiene issue.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 无人值守凭证文件安全核对 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。

name.zh: SQL 注入只读测试预检

description.zh: 该条目保留为技术验证 Payload，保留原始可复现命令，仅补充授权实验、占位符边界、蓝队证据和回滚要求。
description.en: This entry remains a technical-validation payload with its reproducible commands preserved, adding only lab authorization, placeholder boundaries, blue-team evidence, and rollback requirements.

subCategory.zh: SQL 注入只读测试预检

prerequisites.zh: 确认资产、账号、域名或目录范围属于当前授权任务，并记录工具版本与查询时间。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that assets, identities, domains, and directory scope belong to the authorized task, recording tool versions and query time.

prerequisites.zh: 保留命令只可在书面授权、隔离、可回滚的实验中逐条执行；写入、认证、远程动作和凭据处理必须记录目标、主体与停止条件。
prerequisites.en: Run retained commands one at a time only in a written, isolated, reversible lab authorization; record target, principal, and stop conditions for writes, authentication, remote actions, or credential handling.

overview.zh: SQL 注入只读测试预检 保留为可独立复现的技术验证卡。原始命令能力不被删除；审校只处理明显叙述、占位符或不可执行片段，并要求隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
overview.en: Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight remains an independently reproducible technical-validation card. Original command capability is retained; review only repairs obvious narrative, placeholder, or non-executable fragments and requires isolated authorization, rollback, and blue-team evidence.

vulnerability.zh: SQL 语法样例和数据库产品信息不是漏洞。有效发现需要在授权的合成数据或单一测试记录上证明输入到查询结构的未参数化边界，并保存请求、响应和数据库审计证据。
vulnerability.en: SQL syntax samples and database product information are not vulnerabilities. A valid finding requires proof of an unparameterized input-to-query boundary on authorized synthetic data or one test record, with request, response, and database-audit evidence preserved.

exploitation.zh: 先确认身份、范围、回滚点和蓝队采集，再按原始命令逐条执行；把能力结果与资产清单、目录配置、网络流量、端点遥测和服务端日志交叉核对。
exploitation.en: Confirm identity, scope, rollback point, and blue-team collection first, then run the retained commands one at a time; correlate capability results with inventory, directory configuration, network traffic, endpoint telemetry, and server logs.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数化查询、类型约束、最小数据库账号和统一错误处理，限制测试账号与合成数据范围并记录查询审计。修复后仅重放同一只读基线，不扩大数据集或权限。
mitigation.en: Use parameterized queries, type constraints, least-privilege database accounts, and uniform error handling; constrain the test identity to synthetic data and retain query audits. Replay only the same read-only baseline after remediation without expanding data or privileges.

title.zh: 建立SQL 注入只读测试预检前置条件基线
title.en: Establish the Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight Prerequisite Baseline

description.zh: 记录 SQL 注入只读测试预检 的当前主体、单一授权资产、组件或工具版本、适用条件、正常基线和停止条件；不把工具存在或查询成功直接判定为漏洞。
description.en: Record the principal, one authorized asset, component or tool version, applicability conditions, normal baseline, and stop conditions for Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight; do not treat tool availability or query success as a vulnerability.

title.zh: 运行一条SQL 注入只读测试预检验证命令
title.en: Run One Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight Validation Command

description.zh: 只在授权实验中运行 SQL 注入只读测试预检 的第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态，不串联其他动作。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight command in the authorized lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state without chaining other actions.

title.zh: 关联SQL 注入只读测试预检权威证据
title.en: Correlate Authoritative Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight Evidence

description.zh: 对照预期查询模板、参数绑定日志、固定 marker 响应和数据库审计，区分错误处理、搜索语法与真实结构注入。
description.en: Compare the expected query template, parameter-binding logs, fixed-marker response, and database audit to distinguish error handling or search syntax from true structural injection.

title.zh: 修复并回归SQL 注入只读测试预检
title.en: Remediate and Retest Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight

description.zh: 完成 SQL 注入只读测试预检 对应的最小权限、补丁或配置修复后，以相同主体和同一条命令回归，确认正常管理能力保留且原证据链不再成立。
description.en: After the least-privilege, patch, or configuration remediation for Read-Only SQL Injection Test Preflight, retest with the same principal and command to confirm legitimate administration remains available and the original evidence chain no longer holds.

analysis.zh: 结论必须包含单一端点、测试记录、参数、响应差异、数据库版本和日志关联；仅有字符串样例或错误页面不能证明 SQL 注入。
analysis.en: Conclusions must identify one endpoint, test record, parameter, response delta, database version, and log correlation; a string sample or error page alone does not prove SQL injection.

opsecTips.zh: 限制查询次数和输出字段，不保存凭证、Token、邮件正文或无关用户属性。
opsecTips.en: Limit query count and output fields, and do not retain credentials, tokens, mail bodies, or unrelated user attributes.

opsecTips.zh: 检测到超出授权的写操作、认证尝试、非授权资产或异常请求量时立即停止、回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on writes, authentication attempts, unauthorized assets, or abnormal request volume outside the authorization.

review.rationale: SQL 注入只读测试预检 保留为技术验证 Payload；原始攻击语法继续保留，仅清理不可执行叙述并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据。
